Proceedings of the ACM SIGCOMM 2025 Conference

Papers Info

Day 2 - Tuesday, September 9 2025

09:00 — 10:20 | NetAI

Session Chair: Jon Crowcroft

InfiniteHBD: Building Datacenter-Scale High-Bandwidth Domain for LLM with Optical Circuit Switching Transceivers

Chenchen Shou (Peking University); Guyue Liu (Peking University)

Abstract: Scaling Large Language Model training relies on multi-dimensional parallelism.

We propose InfiniteHBD, a transceiver-centric HBD architecture.

DistTrain: Addressing Model and Data Heterogeneity with Disaggregated Training for Multimodal Large Language Models

Zili Zhang (Peking University); Xin Jin (Peking University)

Abstract: Multimodal large language models empower LLMs to ingest inputs and generate outputs.
